aer_result.note: Noiseless Aer simulator — proves algorithm correctness

hardware_result.nisq_assessment: COBYLA converging — 319.5 mHa gap at step 9 vs 714.7 mHa at step 1. Trend indicates convergence toward noise floor. Chemical accuracy (1.6 mHa) not achievable at NISQ without error correction.
hardware_result.honest_conclusion: Receipt infrastructure is the primary deliverable. Hardware measurements confirm NISQ limitations and verify job provenance via IBM job IDs. Algorithm correctness proven on Aer (0.025 mHa).

paper_claim: Paper 26 §7 — receipt-backed VQE on real IBM hardware. The deliverable is verifiable provenance, not chemical accuracy.
going_forward_ratchet: Warm-start from Aer theta + mean-over-N reporting on IBM Premium tier (no fair-share queue)
